sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54889" key="katapornokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπορνοκοπέω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0385.tlg001:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.117</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
